description: Introduce a minimal read-only request-scoped database selection abstraction in `src/dms/core/EdFi.DataManagementService.Core.External/` for backend consumers, plus a Core adapter that bridges from `IDmsInstanceSelection`. Acceptance: the new external contract does not expose `SetSelectedDmsInstance`, does not return `DmsInstance`, exposes enough data for backends to obtain the selected instance ID and required connection string, and has unit coverage for unset-selection and missing-connection failure paths.
steps-to-verify: Add unit tests for the Core adapter and any DI registration added in `DmsCoreServiceExtensions`.

description: Update `src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Mssql/` to consume the new external request-connection abstraction instead of `EdFi.DataManagementService.Core.Configuration.IDmsInstanceSelection`. Acceptance: `MssqlRelationalCommandExecutor` no longer references `Core.Configuration` or `DmsInstance`; `EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Mssql.csproj` no longer references `EdFi.DataManagementService.Core`; existing unit tests and DI registration tests are updated to use the new abstraction; behavior when the selected instance is missing a connection string is unchanged.
steps-to-verify: Update unit tests for `MssqlRelationalCommandExecutor` and `MssqlReferenceResolverServiceCollectionExtensions` to exercise the new abstraction.
Run: `rg -n "Core\.Configuration|DmsInstance" ./src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Mssql` and confirm there are no production-code hits.

description: Add PostgreSQL request-connection infrastructure under `src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Postgresql/` so the new backend no longer imports `Old.Postgresql.NpgsqlDataSourceProvider`. Acceptance: `PostgresqlRelationalCommandExecutor` depends only on types from `Backend.Postgresql`, `Backend`, `Core.External`, and framework/Npgsql packages; the new request-scoped provider preserves current `NpgsqlDataSourceCache` behavior for per-connection-string reuse and builder settings (`NoResetOnClose`, default `ApplicationName`, `AutoPrepareMinUsages`, `MaxAutoPrepare`); unit tests cover cache reuse and per-scope access behavior.
steps-to-verify: Add unit tests for the new PostgreSQL cache/provider types and update `PostgresqlRelationalCommandExecutor` tests to resolve through the new constructor surface.
Run: `rg -n "Old\.Postgresql|NpgsqlDataSourceProvider" ./src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Postgresql` and confirm there are no production-code hits.

description: Rewire PostgreSQL relational reference-resolver composition to use the new request-connection provider and remove the legacy project dependency from `src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Postgresql/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Postgresql.csproj`. Acceptance: the PostgreSQL backend project no longer has a `ProjectReference` to `EdFi.DataManagementService.Old.Postgresql`; service-collection and frontend composition tests still resolve `PostgresqlRelationalCommandExecutor` when PostgreSQL datastore plus relational backend are enabled; targeted tests for the new backend no longer register the legacy `NpgsqlDataSourceProvider`.
steps-to-verify: Update backend and frontend composition tests to use the new PostgreSQL connection registrations.

description: Align PostgreSQL referential-identity DDL emission with Core's canonical UTC DateTime contract in `src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Ddl/RelationalModelDdlEmitter.cs`. Acceptance: `EmitPgsqlColumnToText` emits `to_char(NEW.<col> AT TIME ZONE 'UTC', 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS"Z"')` for `ScalarKind.DateTime`; the stale comment that claims parity with raw inserted literals is replaced with a comment that matches the current Core normalization behavior; `src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Ddl.Tests.Unit/Fixtures/ddl-emission/expected/pgsql/identity-propagation.sql` is updated so `EntryTimestamp` identity text includes UTC normalization and a trailing `Z`.

Align SQL Server referential-identity DDL emission with Core's canonical UTC DateTime contract in `src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Ddl/RelationalModelDdlEmitter.cs`. Acceptance: `EmitMssqlColumnToNvarchar` emits `CONVERT(nvarchar(19), i.<col>, 126) + N'Z'` for `ScalarKind.DateTime`; the method comment states that the trigger format intentionally matches the request/reference-resolution path's canonical `yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ` contract; `src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Ddl.Tests.Unit/Fixtures/ddl-emission/expected/mssql/identity-propagation.sql` is updated in both insert and update branches so `EntryTimestamp` identity text includes the trailing `Z`.

Add a focused generated-DDL PostgreSQL parity test for DateTime identities. Acceptance: create a focused fixture directory under `src/dms/backend/EdFi.DataManagementService.Backend.Ddl.Tests.Unit/Fixtures/focused/` for a resource whose stable identity includes a `DateTime`; add a PostgreSQL generated-DDL integration test that provisions the fixture, inserts a row, reads `dms."ReferentialIdentity"`, and asserts the stored `ReferentialId` matches `EdFi.DataManagementService.Core.Extraction.ReferentialIdCalculator` when the identity value is canonicalized to UTC `yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ` (for example `2025-03-05T08:30:45-05:00` -> `2025-03-05T13:30:45Z`).

Add the matching SQL Server generated-DDL parity test for the same focused DateTime-identity fixture. Acceptance: reuse the focused fixture introduced for PostgreSQL, provision it through the SQL Server generated-DDL harness, insert a row for the DateTime-identity resource, read `[dms].[ReferentialIdentity]`, and assert the stored `ReferentialId` matches `ReferentialIdCalculator` for the canonical UTC `yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ssZ` identity string; the test should fail on the pre-fix trigger format and pass only after the SQL Server emitter appends `Z`.
